English[]

Doctor Doom Boss Voice

Doctor Doom Boss Voice[]

Audio Dialogue
Callouts 1 Bow before me.
2 (laughter) I will crush you all!
3 I will crush you all.
4 Give in... or be destroyed.
5 Enough foolishness!
6 Fools!
7 (heavy breathing) Pathetic fools...!
8 Flee from my power.
9 Swarm like an insects you are.
10 Insolence.
11 (heavy breathing) Insolence...!
12 (laughter).
13 I offer you... perfection.
14 And this is your response?
15 Do not stand in the way of perfection.
16 (laughter) Latveria will rise!
17 You stand against me? Insolence! Arrogance! Foolishness!
18 Those who dare stand against me will pay the price!
19 Stand. Down.
20 (laughter) You cannot stop me now!
21 (heavy breathing) You cannot stop me now!
22 Wretched beasts. (panting)

Doom's Domain (Emote)

Doom's Domain (Emote)[]

Laugh 1
2
3
Exert 1
2
3
4
Chapter 5: Season 4 Story Quests

Chapter 5: Season 4 Story Quests[]

Listen to Doom's Cynthia Memo[]

Audio Subtitle
DOOM: Mother...
I am building my new kingdom.
This place reeks of failure, of fault... of imperfection.
But it will not be this way for long.
I will set this place to order. I will make it perfect.
By gentle, guiding hand... or by brutal fist of submission.

Listen to Doom's Fantastic Four Memo[]

Audio Subtitle
DOOM: I thought it would cheer me, to gaze upon this crumbling monument.
Instead...
I feel nothing but vacant hunger.
It must be the box.
It is... exhilarating. But it is also wild. Chaotic. Uncontrolled.
Using the box again, without my armor appropriately upgraded, would be... Unwise.
But I won't have long to wait. My work nears completion.
When all is reborn, in my perfect image... I will never fail again.

Retreat and talk to Hope[]

Audio Subtitle
DOOM: I've heard this Island's cowards whimper your name in fear.
Hope.
You may be prophecy.
But I am judgement.
And when our weapons do finally cross in combat,
I expect to find you wanting.

22 Wretched beasts. (panting)

Portuguese[]

Doom Boss Voice

Doom Boss Voice[]

Audio Dialogue
Callouts 1 Bow before me.
2 (laughter) I will crush you all.
3 (heavy breathing) I'll crush you all.
4 (heavy breathing) destroyed.
5 of Foolishness.
6 Fools!
7 (heavy breathing) Pathetic fools.
8 Flee from my power.
9 Swarm like an insect you are.
10 Insolence.
11 (heavy breathing) Insolence.
12 (laughter).
13 I offer you... perfection.
14 And this is your response?
15 Do not stand in the way of perfection.
16 (laughter) Latveria will rise!
17 You stand against me? Insolence, arrogant, foolishness!
18 Those who dare stand against me will pay the price!
19 Stand. Down.
20 (laughter) You cannot stop me now!
21 (heavy breathing) You cannot stop me now!
22 Wretched beasts. (panting)
